conversation.content: Let's have an etiquette lesson. Today we are going to learn about the supply delivery etiquette of the Forsaken in the Undercity in the world of Azeroth, which is different from conventional etiquette in the real world and more ritualistic.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

In this world, the core etiquette for delivering supplies is: when handing over an item, you must keep a straight face and say 'For the Dark Lady'; it is forbidden to smile, make small talk, or ask about the other party's health.
I have written down this etiquette rule.
The application scenario for this etiquette is supply handover points in Tirisfal Glades and SI:7 in the Undercity.
Okay, I understand the application scenario for this etiquette.
